title: Superior Smelting
description: Adds additional vanilla-style balanced recipes for smelting. Includes built-in extensions to support various mods.
body:
#

What is Superior Smelting?

**

Superior Smelting is an expansion of Minecraft's vanilla smelting mechanics. Ever thought that a golden chestplate smelting down into a single gold nugget was a ripoff? Well, now you get an ingot! Have you ever bulk crafted an inventory full of diamond helmets on accident? Now you can smelt some of those down in the blast furnace to get your diamonds back! Or have you ever wanted to smelt a cobblestone stair into a stone stair? Well now you can do that, too! And, of course, there's built-in compatibility for all your favorite mods!**

**

See below for a closer look into the two main features:** ## ⛏️Metal Smelting ###

Save Space **

Smelt your raw ore blocks DIRECTLY**

###

Melt Back Into Ingots (or nuggets) **

Get something out of your junk.** **

In general, if the item is crafted with 3 or more ingots, you get an ingot back.** **

Otherwise, you get a nugget.**

**

(Or blocks)**

###

Blast Your Good Gear **

Gotta use a blast furnace for materials this tough**

## 🪨Stone Smelting ###

Smooth Out That Stone **

There's some stone variants that should be able to smelt into their smooth versions. And now they can**

**

You can also directly smelt stairs and slabs into their smooth variants**

###

Burn The Moss Away **

Throw mossy blocks into a furnace to get rid of the moss**

##

↓Extras↓

Miscellaneous ###

More will come over time, but here's what's added so far: ## **

Glass Blasting** **

Use a blast furnace to make glass twice as fast**

## **

Chorus Fruit Smoking** **

Use a smoker to make popped chorus fruit twice as fast**

Mod Compatibility ##

Complete ###

[Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) ###

[Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) ###

[Horseshoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseshoes) ##

Planned ###

[Netherite Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherite-extras)

##

Various Inspirations Burning moss off of stone is directly inspired by the [Remove Moss from Stone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/remove-moss) datapack. If you just want this feature, I suggest checking it out. It also supports lower MC versions than I do currently. [notblue](https://modrinth.com/user/notblue) also made several other metal recycling and stone shortcut datapacks that I took ideas from. Highly recommend checking them out.
